meanings.usage: 复数形式为firemen，指男性消防员，女性为firefighter
常用短语in the forest, forest fire(森林火灾)
cause + n. 表示导致某事发生
the cause of... 表示...的原因
examine + n. 表示对某物进行仔细检查
修饰动词，表示意外地做某事
常用复数remains，表示动植物的残骸或遗迹
remain + adj./n. 表示保持某种状态
泛指蛇类动物，无复数变化
wind的过去式，wound round表示缠绕在...上
只修饰名词，如electric wire电线
简写为V，用于表示电压大小
固定搭配，指传输电力的线路
an explanation of/for something 表示对某事的解释
spark + n. 表示引发某事

examples.en: Firemen have put out a big forest fire.
examples.zh: 消防员已经扑灭了一场大规模的森林火灾。

examples.en: They have been trying to find out how the fire began.
examples.zh: 他们一直试图查明这场火是怎么烧起来的。

examples.en: Cigarette ends which people carelessly throw away often cause fires.
examples.zh: 人们随意扔掉的烟头经常引发火灾。

examples.en: He was able to solve the mystery.
In this way, he was able to solve the mystery.
examples.zh: 就这样，他能够解开这个谜团。

examples.en: A bird had snatched up the snake from the ground.
examples.zh: 一只鸟从地上把蛇抓了起来。

examples.en: The bird dropped it on to the wires.
examples.zh: 那只鸟把蛇扔到了电线上。

examples.en: The snake wound itself round the wires.
examples.zh: 蛇把自己缠绕在电线上。

examples.en: It sent sparks down to the ground.
At last firemen have put out a big forest fire.
examples.zh: 消防员们终于扑灭了一场大规模的森林火灾。

grammar.title: 现在完成时 (Present Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的事件对现在有影响，或从过去持续到现在的动作。常与already, yet, just, since, for等时间副词连用。
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去发生并已完成，但强调与现在的联系的事件。

examples.en: Firemen have put out a big forest fire.
examples.zh: 消防员已经扑灭了一场大规模的森林火灾。

examples.en: They have been trying to find out how the fire began.
examples.zh: 他们一直试图查明火灾是怎么发生的。

grammar.title: 现在完成进行时 (Present Perfect Continuous)
grammar.definition: 表示从过去开始一直持续到现在并可能继续下去的动作，强调动作的持续性。
grammar.structure: 主语 + have/has + been + 动词-ing形式
grammar.usage: 用于强调动作持续进行了一定时间。

examples.en: They have been trying to find out how the fire began.
examples.zh: 他们一直在努力查明火灾发生的原因。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某一时刻或时间段正在进行的动作。
grammar.structure: 主语 + was/were + 动词-ing形式
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在发生的动作，常与when, while等连用。

examples.en: A fireman was examining the ground when he discovered the snake.
examples.zh: 一位消防员正在检查地面时发现了那条蛇。

sentencePatterns.pattern: Since + 时间点, 主语 + have/has + 过去分词

original.en: Since then, they have been trying to find out how the fire began.
original.zh: 从那以后，他们一直试图查明火灾发生的原因。

imitations.en: Since last week, I have been learning English.
imitations.zh: 从上个月开始，我一直在学英语。

imitations.en: Since 2020, he has been working here.
imitations.zh: 自从2020年以来，他一直在这里工作。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be able to + 动词原形

original.en: In this way, he was able to solve the mystery.
original.zh: 就这样，他能够解开这个谜团。

imitations.en: She was able to finish the work on time.
Were you able to understand the story?

sentencePatterns.pattern: When + 主语 + 动词-ed, 主语 + 动词-ed

original.en: When it did so, it sent sparks down to the ground.
original.zh: 当它这样做时，它把火花送到地面上。

imitations.en: When he arrived home, it began to rain.
imitations.zh: 当他到家时，开始下雨了。

imitations.en: When she saw the snake, she screamed.
imitations.zh: 当她看到蛇时，她尖叫起来。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + 动词 + 宾语 + 介词短语

original.en: A bird had snatched up the snake from the ground and then dropped it on to the wires.
original.zh: 一只鸟从地上把蛇抓起来，然后把它扔到了电线上。

imitations.en: The cat caught the mouse from the corner.
imitations.zh: 猫从角落里抓住了老鼠。

imitations.en: He picked up the book from the floor.
